fugue0.1.6

Module db

Module Items

  • Functions

In fugue::cache

fugue::cache

Module db 

Source

Functions§

cache_stats
Get total counts for cache status.
clear_backend
Remove all cached data for a given backend (before re-syncing).
delete_album
Remove a single album and its tracks from the cache.
delete_stale_albums
Remove stale albums (and their tracks) for a backend that are not in the given set of IDs.
delete_stale_artists
Remove stale artists for a backend that are not in the given set of IDs.
find_artist_ids_by_name
Find all namespaced artist IDs across backends for the same artist name.
get_albums_by_artist
get_all_albums
get_all_albums_deduped
Get deduplicated albums. For albums that exist in dedup_groups, only return the best member (highest score). Non-duplicate albums pass through unchanged.
get_all_artists
get_all_artists_deduped
Get deduplicated artists. Groups by normalized name, keeps the version with the most albums but patches albumCount to reflect the total unique albums across all backends (after album dedup).
get_cache_meta
is_cache_fresh
Check if cache for a backend is fresh (updated within max_age_secs).
search_cached
set_cache_meta
upsert_album
upsert_artist
upsert_track
